note: Trace events were declared by the effective adapter generated from source test evidence.

operation_metadata.description: Parse valid big number JSON strings without error.
operation_metadata.normalization: Parsing a valid JSON string returns a non-null (Ok) result.

expected.observable_behavior: parse returns Ok(JsonValue)

operation_metadata.description: Parse invalid big number JSON strings returns null (Err).
operation_metadata.normalization: Parsing an invalid JSON string returns null (Err).

expected.observable_behavior: parse returns Err

operation_metadata.description: cJSON_ParseWithOpts returns NULL on null input.
operation_metadata.normalization: Parsing with null/empty input returns error.

expected.observable_behavior: parse returns Err

operation_metadata.description: cJSON_ParseWithOpts returns NULL on empty string and sets error pointer.
operation_metadata.normalization: Parsing an empty string returns error.

expected.observable_behavior: parse returns Err

operation_metadata.description: cJSON_ParseWithOpts with require_null_terminated=true rejects extra characters.
operation_metadata.normalization: Parsing with negative require_null_terminated equivalent: passing extra characters after JSON fails.

expected.observable_behavior: parse returns Err

operation_metadata.description: cJSON_ParseWithOpts returns NULL on incomplete JSON, sets parse_end.
operation_metadata.normalization: Parsing incomplete JSON returns error.

expected.observable_behavior: parse returns Err

operation_metadata.description: cJSON_GetStringValue returns the string value for strings, NULL for non-strings.
operation_metadata.normalization: as_str returns Some for strings, None for non-strings.

expected.observable_behavior: as_str returns Some for string, None for number and null

operation_metadata.description: cJSON_GetNumberValue returns the double value for numbers, NaN for non-numbers.
operation_metadata.normalization: as_f64 returns Some(f64) for numbers, None for non-numbers.

expected.observable_behavior: as_f64 returns Some for number, None for non-number

operation_metadata.description: Add true/false booleans to object and retrieve them.
operation_metadata.normalization: Creating an object, adding boolean values, retrieving them returns the correct values.

expected.observable_behavior: insert boolean, get returns correct boolean

operation_metadata.description: Add number to object and verify type and value.
operation_metadata.normalization: Adding a number and retrieving it yields correct type and value.

expected.observable_behavior: insert number, get returns number with correct value

operation_metadata.description: Add string to object and verify type and value.
operation_metadata.normalization: Adding a string and retrieving it yields correct type and value.

expected.observable_behavior: insert string, get returns string with correct value

operation_metadata.description: Add true to object and verify type.
operation_metadata.normalization: Adding true and retrieving it yields boolean true.

expected.observable_behavior: insert true, get returns boolean true

operation_metadata.description: Add false to object and verify type.
operation_metadata.normalization: Adding false and retrieving it yields boolean false.

expected.observable_behavior: insert false, get returns boolean false

operation_metadata.description: Add nested object and verify type.
operation_metadata.normalization: Adding an object and retrieving it yields correct type.

expected.observable_behavior: insert object, get returns object type

operation_metadata.description: Add array to object and verify type.
operation_metadata.normalization: Adding an array and retrieving it yields correct type.

expected.observable_behavior: insert array, get returns array type

operation_metadata.description: Replace an item in object preserves key name.
operation_metadata.normalization: Replacing a value under the same key changes the value while preserving key.

expected.observable_behavior: insert again under same key changes value, key preserved

operation_metadata.description: Delete an item from array does not break list structure.
operation_metadata.normalization: After adding items to an array and deleting one, the remaining structure is correct.

input.case: add items to array then delete one

expected.observable_behavior: after removal, array length and remaining items are correct

operation_metadata.description: Type-check functions return correct booleans for each type.
operation_metadata.normalization: Calling is_* on a value of the correct type returns true, false otherwise.

expected.observable_behavior: is_* returns true only for matching type

operation_metadata.description: Create array, add item, check types.
operation_metadata.normalization: After creating array and adding a number, is_array and is_number on the item are true.

expected.observable_behavior: is_array true on array, is_number true on item

operation_metadata.description: Create object, add item with case-sensitive key, check types.
operation_metadata.normalization: After creating object and adding a number with a key, is_object and is_number on the item are true.

expected.observable_behavior: is_object true on object, is_number true on item

operation_metadata.description: Circular reference detection prevents deep copy.
operation_metadata.normalization: Creating circular structure cannot be replicated directly, but array removal works.

expected.observable_behavior: array_remove returns removed value

operation_metadata.description: Delete an item from an object by key, item is removed.
operation_metadata.normalization: Removing a key from an object removes it and does not affect other keys.

expected.observable_behavior: key is removed, value returned

operation_metadata.description: Detach (remove and return) an item from an object by key (case-sensitive).
operation_metadata.normalization: Removing a key returns the removed value.

expected.observable_behavior: key is removed, original value returned

operation_metadata.description: Check if an object has a given key.
operation_metadata.normalization: has_key returns true if the key exists, false otherwise.

expected.observable_behavior: has_key returns true for existing key, false for missing

operation_metadata.description: Print a JSON value as a pretty-printed string.
operation_metadata.normalization: Calling pretty on a parsed JSON value produces a formatted string.

expected.observable_behavior: pretty returns a formatted JSON string

operation_metadata.description: Replace an item in an object under a given key (case-sensitive).
operation_metadata.normalization: Inserting under an existing key replaces the value.

expected.observable_behavior: new value replaces old under same key

operation_metadata.description: Delete an item from an object by key (case-sensitive) - null safety.
operation_metadata.normalization: Calling remove on a null JsonValue (non-object) returns Null.

expected.observable_behavior: remove on Null returns Null

operation_metadata.description: Detach an item from an object by key (non-case-sensitive) - null safety.
operation_metadata.normalization: Calling remove on a null JsonValue (non-object) returns Null.

expected.observable_behavior: remove on Null returns Null
